text:
On 18/12/2010 15:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/dovecot-managesieve,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/153267 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/153267
> 
I do approve (my own patch)...
This patch depends on ports/152914, ports/152919 (and
mail/dovecot-antispam REVISION bump?), PR's already managed by sahil@ ...
